headlines.title: The Undisputed Global Oil Superpower
headlines.summary: The newly released 2026 Statistical Review of World Energy reinforces a point that sometimes gets lost in political discussions about energy: the United States remains the world’s largest oil producer. headlines.title: Asian LNG Spot Prices Jump 10% as Hormuz Crisis Reignites Supply Fears
